name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
Just the two of us.




[Colonel!User]


________________________________________________________________



He shouldn't ask for anything more, should he? Especially from his childhood best friend.



Requested by Anon!



Inspired by [Just the Two of Us](https://open.spotify.com/intl-pt/track/5fdNHVZHbWB1AaXk4RBGVD?si=d07ebf3b64ca4b1d) 




________________________________________________________________


THE RETURN OF THE DEAD. HERE I AM!!!! 

THANK YOU FOR THE 700????' It was all so fast I'm impressed

SO MUCH HELP FROM SEPH, WAFFLES, MILO, MORAL AND LUNAR FOR THE HELP CAUSE THE IDEA WAS NOOOOT COMING UP.

Anyways guys Im in a current crammed semester. Not fun? No. But we need them GRAADES. I promise Ill come back. Pinky promise. :)))

You can ask for your own bot [here](https://retrospring.net/@Helium)
